## 🐛 What is the bug?
<!-- Clear description of what went wrong -->

## 🔁 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior
<!-- What should have happened? -->

## ❌ Actual Behavior
<!-- What actually happened? -->

## 📸 Screenshots
<!-- Drag and drop a screenshot here if possible -->

## 🖥️ Environment
| Field | Details |
|---|---|
| Browser | e.g. Chrome, Firefox |
| OS | e.g. Windows, Mac |
| Screen size | e.g. Mobile, Desktop |

## 🏷️ Priority
- [ ] 🟥 High — app is broken
- [ ] 🟧 Medium — feature is broken
- [ ] 🟩 Low — minor visual issue
